title: MODERATED YOUTH CHAT ROOMS - 211info
text: LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER MODERATED YOUTH CHAT ROOMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weekly moderated groups for LGBTQIA+ youth and for transgender, pan-gender, and gender-fluid teens to talk in a safe space and to be able to fully express themselves without fear of being made to feel uncomfortable or unwelcome. Participants discuss concerns and issues and talk about personal victories. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: LGBTQIA+ Chat Room: Individuals age 12-19 who identify as LGBTQIA+ Transgender Teen Chat Room: Individuals age 19 and younger who identify as transgender, pan-gender, gender fluid, gender expansive, or questioning Hours: LGBTQIA+ Teen Chat Room: Tuesday/Wednesday 4pm-7pm Transgender Teen Chat Room: Thursday/Friday 4pm-7pm Email (415) 355-0003 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (415) 355-0003 Administration Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: LGBTQ2+ Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL HOTLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL SENIOR HOTLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL YOUTH TALKLINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - LGBT NATIONAL COMING OUT SUPPORT HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER
